calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

W. Dean Cloud, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, First American Title Insurance Company, a California Company
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) William R. Hambrecht, an individual and as Trustee of the Hambrecht 1980 Revocable Trust
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Does 1-10 dismissal on file.
Witness: W. Dean Cloud Esq.Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $195, 000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $19,018.84
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $710.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $214,728.84
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Continued To Aug-05-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
